category_sources: Official GitHub README describes ctpv as image previews for lf.
source_facts.description says ctpv provides image previews for the lf file manager.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository name and README use ctpv.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the repository documentation surface.
Official GitHub README points to nikitaivanov.com/man1/ctpv for full command-line and configuration documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/NikitaIvanovV/ctpv; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official README documents command-line options and preview configuration.
source_facts.description identifies image previews for lf.
